title: Altervoch
body:
![Stage demonstrating some of Altervoch's features (v25)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d546d22b7663daa64918bad7cf8a00a350248b15.jpeg)

Woooo 200 downloads!!!

Altervoch adjusts and improves a ton of vanilla textures. For several years this has been my personal texture pack and I might as well share it. See the gallery for photos!

# Features

A full list of features can be found within the changelog text file found within. Here is a shortlist:

- Textures that I thought were better before the Texture Update are improved (and may be closer to their before-Texture Update designs)
- Adding animated textures to blocks such as Furnaces and Crying Obsidian
- Random variant blocks such as varied bookshelves and more flower colours
- Some objects are now modelled in 3D such as Sugar Canes, Iron Bars, and Doors
- Other random tweaks to blocks that may be barely noticable
